rows.note: Clear leverage, little pressure, or a forgiving situation.
A familiar challenge with a meaningful chance of trouble.
Real pressure, rough conditions, or a trained opponent.
Dangerous circumstances that call for skill and commitment.
Exceptional opposition or several serious complications at once.
A feat that should feel almost impossible in the fiction.

rows.label: Hidden
rows.note: Ends when the creature is seen, enters an enemy's sight, or attacks.

rows.label: Restrained
rows.note: The creature can still act from its current position.

rows.label: Vulnerable
rows.note: Applies to every roll that targets the creature.

rows.label: 0 or less
rows.note: Damage fully reduced.

rows.label: Below Major
rows.note: Minor damage.

rows.label: Major to below Severe
rows.note: Major damage.

rows.label: Severe or higher
rows.note: Severe damage.

rows.label: Twice Severe
rows.note: Optional Massive Damage rule.

rows.label: Critical
rows.note: The player leads the description and gains an extra advantage or opportunity.

rows.label: Success with Hope
rows.note: They succeed, gain Hope, and the world answers their action.

rows.label: Success with Fear
rows.note: They succeed; take Fear and introduce a minor cost or complication.

rows.label: Failure with Hope
rows.note: They miss their aim, gain Hope, and face a minor consequence.

rows.label: Failure with Fear
rows.note: Things worsen; take Fear and make a consequential move.

rows.label: Make a move
rows.note: Act when the fiction demands an answer or the players hand you an opportunity.

rows.label: Soft move
rows.note: Reveal pressure, shift the scene, or show what is about to happen.

rows.label: Hard move
rows.note: Deal the impact directly when warning has passed or a Fear result warrants it.

rows.label: Useful prompts
rows.note: Let an NPC act, move the environment, spotlight danger, or close an opportunity.

rows.label: Spend 1 Fear
rows.value: Interrupt · extra move · Fear Feature · Experience
rows.note: Steal the spotlight, add a move, activate a Fear Feature, or add an adversary Experience to a roll.

rows.label: Incidental
rows.note: Recovery, information gathering, or routine resupply.

rows.label: Minor
rows.note: Travel trouble or a small skirmish that points toward danger.

rows.label: Standard
rows.note: A substantial fight, perilous journey, or tense negotiation.

rows.label: Major
rows.note: A large battle or a scene that changes a character's story.

rows.label: Climactic
rows.note: A story-arc confrontation or defining set piece.
